name: prototype-comments
description: Drop-in Firebase comment overlay for HTML prototypes

scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:cdn && npm run test:dist-sync && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:draw && npm run test:e2e:pagescope && npm run test:e2e:feedback && npm run test:e2e:note && npm run test:e2e:notedel && npm run test:e2e:notemultiline && npm run test:e2e:noterange && npm run test:e2e:noteoutside && npm run test:e2e:spec && npm run test:e2e:comments && npm run test:e2e:drag && npm run test:visual
scripts.test: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
